chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P No. S-450 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 26.01.2026 Mr. Amanullah Luhur, Advocate for the Petitioner. -x-x-x-x-x- The petitioner alleges that she is being harassed by the respondent No.7, who is the I.T Incharge posted at the SP Office, Shikarpur, who has lodged an FIR against the petitioner’s husband for the offence under section 489-F PPC. Earlier, a similar allegation was made against the SHO, P.S Foujdari, which was also unsubstantiated albeit disposed of by the DSP Complaint Cell, Shikarpur and then by the Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur under section 22-A Cr.P.C., on the basis of a direction given by the DSP Complaint Cell that the petitioner shall not be harassed by the police officers. The repeat of the allegation by way of this petition is again unsubstantiated, inasmuch as no prejudicial action has been taken against the petitioner after a previous complaint. Therefore, the complaint does not warrant the exercise of writ jurisdiction. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE Zulfiqar
